title: British Columbia Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content: In Q2 2025, ZEV sales as a percentage of total vehicle sales saw a year-over-year (YoY) decline of 27.63%, dropping from 20.07% in Q2 2024 to 14.24% in Q2 2025.Â  The share of BEVs within total ZEV sales recorded a decrease of 40.76% on a YoY basis. ZEV sales per 1,000 people declined by 28.54% YoY, falling from 8.59 in Q2 2024 to 6.14 in Q2 2025.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
